title: IT Technical Training
description:
**Overview**  

In alignment with our Microsoft values, we are committed to cultivating an inclusive work environment for all employees to positively impact our culture every day and we need you on the **Cloud Operations \+ Innovation (CO\+I) Learning** team as an **IT Technical Trainer****.**


As a CO\+I Learning IT Technical Traineryou will contribute to establishing technical training delivery, workforce training needs analysis, and engaging with your team in procedural change management activities in support of the datacenters in your area of responsibility. You will leverage technical and adult learning fundamentals as you evaluate and report on training activities in the datacenters and develop your own skills while coaching your learners in their own career growth. Location is on\-site in the datacenter with limited work from home opportunities.


Microsoft’s Cloud Operations \& Innovation is the engine that powers our cloud services. As an IT Technical Traineryou will perform a key role in delivering the core infrastructure and foundational technologies for Microsoft's online services including Bing, Office 365, Xbox, OneDrive, and the Microsoft Azure platform. As a group, CO\+I is focused on the personal and professional development for all employees and offers trainings and growth opportunities including Career Rotation Programs, Diversity \& Inclusion trainings and events, and professional certifications.


Our infrastructure is comprised of a large global portfolio of more than 200 datacenters in 32 countries and millions of servers. Our foundation is built upon and managed by a team of subject matter experts working to support services for more than 1 billion customers and 20 million businesses in over 90 countries worldwide.


With environmental sustainability and optimization at the forefront of our datacenter design and operations, we continue to grow and evolve as we meet the ever\-changing business demands that hold Microsoft as a world\-class cloud provider.


Microsoft’s mission is to empower every person and every organization on the planet to achieve more. As employees we come together with a growth mindset, innovate to empower others, and collaborate to realize our shared goals. Each day we build on our values of respect, integrity, and accountability to create a culture of inclusion where everyone can thrive at work and beyond.

 **Responsibilities** **Location: Milano**

* Align learning preparation with relevant metrics for measuring success (e.g., cloud consumption, survey feedback).
* Build awareness of the latest features, technologies, and processes and incorporate those into current learning experiences to ensure quality learning environment and delivery.
* Deliver single to multi\-day training or other learning experiences in\-person or virtually with minimal supervision leveraging a variety of delivery methods, including presentations, discussions, labs, and simulations, to deliver training.
* Use digitally enhanced instructor\-led resources to effectively deliver technology\-based learning experiences that prepare our IT technicians for local qualifications.
* Apply classroom management techniques such as flexible learning, behavioral reinforcement, and time management to reinforce learning while engaging with learners to ensure content and concepts are understood and aligned with operational goals.
* Create a friendly, supportive environment and encourage learners to ask questions; monitor the progress of learners to appropriately reinforce important learning; participate in hands\-on lab activities to further build upon learning; and provide course content feedback to broader Learning Team using appropriate internal team channels as necessary to ensure consistency and relevance across our curriculum portfolio.
* Embody our culture and values.

  

**Qualifications** **Required Qualifications:**

* Bachelor's Degree AND training, education, information technology (IT), cloud systems, datacenter environments, server environments, or computer technologies experience
	+ OR equivalent experience.

**Background Check Requirements:**


Ability to meet Microsoft, customer and/or government security screening requirements are required for this role. These requirements include, but are not limited to the following specialized security screenings:

* Microsoft Cloud Background Check: This position will be required to pass the Microsoft Cloud background check upon hire/transfer and every two years thereafter.

**Preferred Qualifications:**

* Experience in Datacenter \& IT Operations across various functions and College or university degree, US Armed Services Honorable Discharge, or additional experience
* Exceptional written and Interpersonal skills: communicate effectively and concisely with stakeholders and organizational leaders about our programs and objectives.
* CompTIA CTT\+ or equivalent technical training certification, or ability to complete within 6 months of hire
* Current Industry framework certification (ITIL, Prince, Lean Six Sigma) or Technical Certification (CCNA, MCSE, NET\+)

  

  

  

Technical Training IC3 \- The typical base pay range for this role across Italy is € 39,300\.00 \- € 58,900\.00 per year. Certain roles may be eligible for benefits and other compensation.


Find additional benefits and pay information here:  

https://careers.microsoft.com/v2/global/en/corporate\-pay/italy\-corporate\-pay.html

title: Gestione Polizze Assicurative – RC Professionale e Settore Sanitario
description:
**Specialista RC Professionale – Settore Sanitario e Odontoiatrico**

**CHI SIAMO**

**ORIS Broker** è una società di brokeraggio assicurativo specializzata nella consulenza e gestione di coperture assicurative per professionisti e imprese.

Collaboriamo con il **Gruppo A.N.D.I. (Associazione Nazionale Dentisti Italiani)** e rappresentiamo un punto di riferimento nella gestione delle soluzioni assicurative dedicate al **mondo odontoiatrico e sanitario.** Ogni giorno affianchiamo migliaia di professionisti nella tutela della propria attività attraverso prodotti assicurativi specialistici e un servizio altamente qualificato.

**Per il potenziamento della nostra sede di Milano, siamo alla ricerca di una figura con esperienza nel ramo Responsabilità Civile Professionale.**

**IL RUOLO** 

Cerchiamo una persona con esperienza nel settore assicurativo, preferibilmente maturata nell'ambito delle **RC Professionali** o delle **coperture dedicate ai professionisti sanitari.**

La risorsa entrerà a far parte del team operativo e si occuperà della gestione amministrativa e tecnica delle polizze, supportando clienti, convenzioni e attività di brokeraggio in un contesto dinamico e specializzato.

**MANSIONI PRINCIPALI**

* Gestione e amministrazione delle polizze assicurative in convenzione e fuori convenzione
* Supporto operativo nella gestione delle coperture RC Professionale
* Emissione, rinnovo e aggiornamento dei contratti assicurativi
* Gestione delle relazioni con clienti, compagnie e intermediari
* Assistenza telefonica e via email agli assicurati
* Supporto nella predisposizione di nuove convenzioni assicurative
* Aggiornamento e organizzazione della documentazione e degli archivi aziendali

**I REQUISITI CHE RICERCHIAMO**

* Almeno 3 aa di esperienza presso broker assicurativi, agenzie o compagnie
* Conoscenza del settore assicurativo danni
* Esperienza nella gestione di **polizze di Responsabilità Civile Professionale (**requisito preferenziale)
* Gradita esperienza nel settore **sanitario, medical malpractice o professioni ordinistiche**
* Precisione, autonomia organizzativa e orientamento al cliente
* Buone capacità relazionali e predisposizione al lavoro in team
* Conoscenza dei **gestionali EXABROKER e/o BRAIN considerata un plus**

**LA NOSTRA OFFERTA**

* Inserimento in una realtà consolidata
* Specializzazione in un settore altamente qualificato come quello delle RC Professionali per il comparto odontoiatrico e sanitario

**INQUADRAMENTO E PACCHETTO RETRIBUTIVO** 

* Contratto **CCNL Commercio Confcommercio (14 mensilità)**
* Iniziale tempo determinato di 6 mesi con prospettive di stabilizzazione a tempo indeterminato (no sostituzione)
* Orario full\-time, dal lunedì al venerdì (precisamente: 40 ore settimanali : dalle 9 alle 18, con un'ora di pausa per il pranzo e flessibilità in ingresso/uscita di 30 minuti)
* Livello 4° \- 3° (a seconda del pregresso di esperienza e specializzazione)
* R.A.L. compresa tra €26\.000 e €30\.000
* Buoni pasto elettronici (Euro 5,16\)
* Sede di lavoro: Milano – Via Ripamonti 44

**COME INVIARE LA TUA CANDIDATURA**

Invia la tua candidatura tramite la piattaforma allegando il tuo **curriculum vitae.** Le candidature verranno valutate con particolare attenzione per profili che abbiano maturato esperienza nella gestione di polizze **RC Professionali, con preferenza per il settore sanitario e odontoiatrico.**

Per eventuali comunicazioni relative al processo di selezione è possibile scrivere esclusivamente a **candidature@orisbroker.it.**

\-\-

La ricerca è rivolta a candidati di qualsiasi genere, età e nazionalità, nel rispetto della normativa vigente. In ORIS Broker crediamo nel valore della diversità e promuoviamo un ambiente di lavoro inclusivo, professionale e meritocratico.

Retribuzione: €26\.000,00 \- €30\.000,00 all'anno

Benefit:

* Assistenza sanitaria integrativa
* Buoni pasto

description:
**Chi siamo**:

Famiglia Nuova è una Cooperativa Sociale mista di tipo A \+ B, che dal 1981 lavora per contrastare ogni forma di emarginazione sociale. Nata per dare una risposta concreta alle problematiche connesse all’uso di sostanze, nel tempo si è strutturata sviluppando quattro aree di intervento: area minori e famiglie, area adulti ambito sociale, area servizi socio\-sanitari e area inserimento lavorativo.

**Chi cerchiamo**:

Cerchiamo un educatore/una educatrice in fascia diurna per la Comunità residenziale di Pieve Porto Morone (PV). La comunità svolge la propria attività pedagogico\-riabilitativa dedicata a chi vive condizioni di dipendenza da sostanze stupefacenti, anche con persone che usufruiscono di misure alternative al carcere.

La figura ricercata opererà in fascia diurna, con un focus specifico sugli interventi educativi, sulla progettazione individualizzata e sull'accompagnamento degli ospiti nel loro percorso di crescita personale e di reinserimento sociale.

**Requisiti:**

· Laurea in Scienze dell'Educazione (L\-19\) o titolo equipollente;

· interesse per l'ambito delle dipendenze e del lavoro educativo in contesti comunitari;

· patente B e disponibilità di auto propria.

**Cosa offriamo:**

L'offerta prevede un'assunzione iniziale a tempo determinato con applicazione del CCNL Cooperative Sociali, livello D2, finalizzata a una successiva stabilizzazione.

**Si garantiscono**:

· lavoro in fascia diurna;

· équipe settimanale;

· supervisione mensile con psicoterapeuta qualificato;

· piano di formazione annuale

*L’offerta di lavoro è rivolta a candidati di entrambi i sessi, nel rispetto della normativa vigente (Dlgs 198/2006 e Dlgs 215/2003 e 216/2003\)*

title: Tecnico Frigorista - Area Milano
description:
**Ruolo:** **Tecnico Frigorista**
---------------------------------

**Luogo: Nord Italia \- preferibilmente residente in area Milano/Monza, trasferte 30% in Nord Italia (Piemonte, Liguria, Lombardia, Veneto, Emilia)**

**Tipo di contratto: indeterminato**


**Costruisci una carriera con fiducia**


Carrier Global Corporation, leader mondiale nella fornitura di soluzioni intelligenti per il clima e l'energia, si impegna a creare soluzioni che abbiano rilevanza per il nostro pianeta e per le generazioni future. Fin dall'inizio siamo stati leader nell'inventare nuove tecnologie e industrie completamente nuove. Oggi continuiamo a essere leader perché abbiamo risorse diversificate a livello mondiale che mettono il cliente al centro di tutto ciò che facciamo.

**Scopo della posizione**


Tecnico frigorista esperto dedicato all’esecuzione di attività di Field Service su gruppi frigo, per sistemi HVAC e produttivi (installazioni civili ed industriali)


Al candidato saranno affidati gli interventi di primo avviamento, nonché di manutenzione ordinaria e straordinaria su gruppi frigo ad aria e ad acqua, con compressori scroll, a vite.

**Responsabilità**

  

Le tue principali responsabilità saranno:

* Eseguire interventi di manutenzione preventiva, in modo accurato, secondo protocolli di manutenzione definiti, al fine di garantire la funzionalità ottimale e la durata nel tempo dei chiller manutenuti;

  

Diagnosticare eventuali problematiche tecniche ed implementare le soluzioni più appropriate per ripristinare in tempi rapidi la corretta funzionalità delle unità;

* Individuare potenziali attività tecniche di miglioramento e modernizzazione dei gruppi frigo e/o di altre componenti dei sistemi HVAC a servizio degli edifici;
* Supportare e collaborare proattivamente con la rete di vendita nel determinare le soluzioni tecniche più adatte alle esigenze del cliente finale;
* Redigere Rapporti di intervento chiari e precisi in grado di veicolare al cliente una corretta comprensione delle attività effettuate e/o suggerite

**Requisiti**


Cerchiamo qualcuno che abbia:


Diploma di scuola Media Superiore (perito elettronico o elettrico o simili);


Ottima conoscenza (almeno 5 anni di esperienza) di gruppi frigo (compressori scroll, a vite, centrifughi e assorbitori) di uno o più dei principali brand HVAC;


Buone e comprovate competenze di termodinamica e meccanica di funzionamento degli impianti, con particolare focus nella manutenzione degli impianti HVAC Data\-center, nonché abilità pratiche di saldobrasatura e di impiantistica elettrica;

* Capacità di lavorare sia in autonomia che in team;
* Spiccata attitudine alla gestione delle esigenze del cliente.
* In possesso di certificato F\-Gas;
* Residenza preferibilmente area Milano, Lombardia
* Automunito (patente di guida tipo B);
* Disponibile a trasferte sul territorio nazionale;

**Costituiscono titolo preferenziale**

* La conoscenza della lingua Francese e/o Inglese;
* La conoscenza di sistemi di automazione, controllo e monitoraggio;
* Conoscenza di impianti installati presso Data\-center;

**Cosa offriamo**


Ci impegniamo a offrire benefits competitivi per tutti i nostri dipendenti, ed a migliorare i nostri programmi quando necessario.

* Assunzione a tempo indeterminato
* Ambiente di lavoro internazionale
* Corsi di formazione professionale
* Azienda focalizzata sul benessere delle persone
* Possibilità di home office due volte alla settimana
* Bonus annuali

**l nostro impegno nei tuoi confronti**


La competenza, la creatività e la passione dei nostri collaboratori sono delle risorse fondamentali per Carrier. Ci impegniamo a costruire un ambiente di lavoro che attragga, sviluppi e trattenga i migliori talenti, che promuova il coinvolgimento dei collaboratori, il lavoro di squadra e, in definitiva, favorisca l'innovazione a beneficio dei nostri clienti. Ci sforziamo di creare un ambiente in cui si possa provare un senso di appartenenza, con la diversità e l'inclusione come motore di crescita e d'innovazione. Sviluppiamo e implementiamo programmi e pratiche best\-in\-class, fornendo opportunità di carriera, ascoltando il feedback dei dipendenti e sfidando sempre noi stessi a fare meglio. Tutto questo è *The Carrier Way*.


Unisciti a noi e fai la differenza.

**Fascia****retributiva**


La retribuzione annuale per questa posizione è compresa tra 37\.278 € e 45\.709 € lordi all'anno. I fattori che possono influenzare la retribuzione includono, a titolo esemplificativo ma non esaustivo, competenze, istruzione, esperienza e altre qualifiche specifiche del candidato selezionato.

**Benefit**


Offriamo un pacchetto retributivo competitivo che può includere ulteriori benefit e programmi di benessere. Le offerte variano in base al ruolo e alla sede e sono progettate per supportare la salute, la sicurezza e il successo dei dipendenti.


Parità di trattamento e non discriminazione

title: Addetto/a alle vendite Categorie Protette - ex Legge 68/99
description:
**Descrizione dell'azienda**  

METRO è un’azienda internazionale leader nel commercio all'ingrosso nel settore HoReCa, specializzata nel servire le esigenze di alberghi, ristoranti e catering, nonché i commercianti indipendenti. Presente in Italia in 16 regioni con circa 4\.000 dipendenti e 46 punti vendita. E tu, hai passione per la ristorazione e l’ospitalità? Ti stiamo aspettando!

 **Descrizione del lavoro**  

Per il punto vendita di **Como** stiamo cercando un **Addetto/a alle vendite** da inserire nei reparti freschi/ultrafresh. Le risorse si occuperanno del servizio al cliente Ho.Re.Ca (Hotel\-Restaurant\-Catering) all’interno del reparto assegnato, collaborando con il proprio team di riferimento.  

  

Nello specifico, le risorse si occuperanno di:  

  

* Supportare la/il Capo Reparto nella gestione dell’area di riferimento operando con passione e professionalità, al fine di incrementare le vendite e migliorare i risultati economici del reparto.
* Rifornire gli scaffali e preparare il reparto in modo da valorizzare i prodotti pensati per la nostra clientela professionale.
* Guidare il cliente nelle scelte ed essere in grado di rispondere alle sue richieste.


  

Cosa possiamo offrirti per svolgere al meglio il tuo lavoro?  

  

* Lavoro all’interno di un **Team** altamente qualificato
* **Formazione** specifica del settore, anche senza esperienza (Sicurezza, HACCP, formazione prodotto, procedure interne)
* **Strumenti** di lavoro orientati allo sviluppo digitale
* Possibilità di **crescita** interna

  

  

  

**Qualifiche**  

Forte Orientamento al Cliente e al Mercato  

Orientamento al risultato  

Capacità di lavorare in Team e gestione dello stress  

Disponibilità a lavorare su turni e nei giorni Festivi

 **Informazioni aggiuntive**  

Contratto di lavoro: Tempo Determinato con inquadramento al livello 5 (Ccnl Distribuzione Moderna Organizzata) con una retribuzione annua lorda di €11\.606,07 per 20 ore settimanali. Sarà previsto un passaggio automatico al livello 4 dopo i primi 18 mesi.

*Le informazioni sulla RAL (Retribuzione Annua Lorda) sono fornite a fini di trasparenza e hanno valore indicativo; non costituiscono un’offerta vincolante né generano aspettative sulle condizioni finali, che saranno definite nel corso del processo di selezione in base al profilo e alle competenze della persona candidata.*


Organizzazione del lavoro: Part\-Time 20 ore settimanali  

Sede di lavoro: Vertemate con Minoprio  

L'annuncio rispetta quanto disposto dall'art. 10 del D.Lgs n. 276/2003\.

title: Selezione Specialista in Contrattualistica Pubblica e Bandi di Evidenza – Area Tender
description:
Siamo un'azienda italiana operante nella ricerca e selezione del personale che si occupa di soddisfare le necessità dei clienti offrendo servizi personalizzati.

  

  

**Posizione:**
--------------

Prestigiosa realtà consortile operante su scala transnazionale nei servizi integrati di progettazione tecnica e pianificazione edilizia – presente con propri centri operativi a **Milano, Cagliari, Modena, Lecce e in territorio elvetico** – seleziona un profilo qualificato nel comparto delle costruzioni da integrare nella propria struttura.


La collaborazione verrà attivata mediante un accordo per detentori di regime libero\-professionale (**Partita IVA**) con una pianificazione iniziale di **dodici mesi**, finalizzata al consolidamento del rapporto e all'avanzamento di carriera all'interno dell'organizzazione.


Il Ruolo e i Flussi Operativi:


La risorsa opererà all'interno del reparto dedito alle procedure di evidenza pubblica, collaborando in un contesto di squadra strutturato. Il focus principale sarà orientato verso i mercati e le commesse transfrontaliere, con particolare riferimento al settore delle grandi opere e delle infrastrutture.


L'attività prevede lo svolgimento in piena autonomia o in coordinamento interdisciplinare delle seguenti mansioni:

* Scouting e Diagnosi di Mercato: Monitorare in modo sistematico i portali internazionali per l'individuazione e l'analisi di bandi di selezione ed evidenze pubbliche estere.
* Istruttoria Documentale: Predisporre l'intera documentazione tecnica necessaria per la presentazione di manifestazioni d'interesse (Expression of Interest \- EOI) e per l'allestimento delle offerte di gara.
* Interfaccia Istituzionale: Prendere parte attiva a tavoli tecnici, riunioni telematiche e call di coordinamento con i rappresentanti di istituti di credito mondiali e funzionari dei ministeri delle stazioni committenti.
* Valorizzazione dell'Immagine Aziendale: Curare la stesura del profilo d'impresa, delle referenze societarie e dei dossier di qualifica necessari per l'accesso alle selezioni.
* Sviluppo di Sinargie Professionali: Implementare e curare le relazioni commerciali con primari studi di architettura e ingegneria, sia sul territorio nazionale che estero, finalizzate alla costituzione di raggruppamenti temporanei di imprese (RTI) e consorzi.

**Requisiti:**
--------------

Profilo del Professionista ed Abilità:

* Capacità Linguistiche: Richiesta un'ottima comprensione e padronanza parlata e scritta della lingua inglese, supportata da idoneo attestato di grado non inferiore al B2\.
* Competenze Personali: Notevole meticolosità, indipendenza nella pianificazione delle scadenze, padronanza espositiva in tavoli tecnici, nonché spiccato orientamento alle dinamiche di gruppo e ottime doti relazionali.


Criteri Preferenziali:

* Costituisce un fattore di valorizzazione del profilo il possesso di un background lavorativo specifico nella gestione di gare d'appalto oltreconfine.
* Gradita la conoscenza della lingua francese con un livello di autonomia minimo corrispondente al grado B1\.


Logistica e Flessibilità Organizzativa:


La persona inserita potrà definire d'intesa con l'organizzazione il proprio ufficio di riferimento sul territorio tra le sedi di **Milano**, **Modena** o **Cagliari**. Il modello di collaborazione contempla inoltre soluzioni flessibili di lavoro a distanza (**Smartworking**).

**Altre informazioni:**
-----------------------

La nostra proposta e i vantaggi previsti:

* Contesto Aziendale Accreditato: Integrazione in un ecosistema professionale inserito all'interno di un'organizzazione provvista di certificazioni di qualità ufficiali.
* Piani Didattici e Qualifiche: Accesso a percorsi di addestramento mirati e programmi di specializzazione continua, con la concreta opportunità di conseguire patentini e attestazioni formali di competenza.
* Scambio e Condivisione: Coinvolgimento in frequenti tavoli di discussione e sessioni di raccordo interne all'azienda, ideati per favorire il confronto interdisciplinare e la circolazione delle idee.
* Avanzamento di Carriera: concrete opportunità di sviluppo e crescita professionale meritocratica nel lungo termine.

title: Proposal Engineer
description:
**CHI SIAMO**



ISAAC è nata tra le mura del Politecnico di Milano con una missione ambiziosa: rivoluzionare la protezione strutturale degli edifici attraverso tecnologie smart, avanzate e accessibili. Siamo oggi una realtà riconosciuta a livello nazionale per le nostre soluzioni intelligenti nel controllo delle vibrazioni e nella protezione sismica, con installazioni su scuole, ospedali ed edifici residenziali.



Al centro del nostro lavoro c’è una tecnologia proprietaria unica: un sistema attivo e non invasivo capace di “smorzare” le oscillazioni degli edifici grazie a masse mobili azionate da motori elettrici. Una soluzione all’avanguardia che può essere installata direttamente sul tetto, senza interventi strutturali invasivi.



Il nostro team unisce competenze di alto livello in ingegneria strutturale, meccatronica e gestione aziendale, ed è animato dalla voglia di fare la differenza, con spirito imprenditoriale, apertura e tanta voglia di crescere insieme.



Se vuoi lavorare su progetti concreti, tecnologicamente sfidanti e ad alto impatto, e far parte di un team che unisce ambizione e umanità… allora potresti essere la persona giusta per noi.


**CHI CERCHIAMO**



Cerchiamo una persona con **solide basi di ingegneria strutturale** e una forte capacità di **ragionamento applicativo**, che sappia muoversi tra analisi tecnica, comprensione del contesto progettuale e costruzione di proposte convincenti per i nostri clienti.



È un ruolo adatto a chi ama **tradurre problemi reali in soluzioni tecniche concrete**, non fermandosi al calcolo fine a sé stesso ma ragionando in termini di fattibilità, valore per il cliente e coerenza con l’offerta ISAAC.


**Cosa farai:**



Entrerai a far parte del team tecnico ISAAC con un ruolo di interfaccia tra area ingegneristica e area commerciale.



In particolare, ti occuperai di:


* Gestire, in autonomia o a supporto del team sales, le attività di prefattibilità tecnica
* Comprendere le esigenze del cliente dal punto di vista tecnico, analizzando: tipologia di opera; vincoli strutturali e progettuali; fase del progetto e criticità applicative.
* Individuare e proporre la soluzione tecnica ISAAC più adatta per ciascun contesto, spiegandone logica di funzionamento, benefici e limiti
* Supportare la preparazione di: proposte tecniche, documentazione di prefattibilità; concept di soluzione per progettisti e committenti.
* Collaborare con i team interni per rendere le proposte sempre più chiare, coerenti ed efficaci
* Partecipare, quando necessario, a call tecniche o incontri con clienti, studi di progettazione e partner
* Contribuire allo sviluppo e al miglioramento continuo dei processi di proposal e prefattibilità tecnica
* Partecipare ad eventi tecnici e scientifici, nazionali e internazionali (seminari, convegni, conferenze), per: presentare e spiegare le soluzioni ISAAC a un pubblico tecnico qualificato; supportare le attività di divulgazione e posizionamento tecnologico; raccogliere feedback e stimoli dal mercato.


**Chi sei**


* Hai una formazione tecnica o ingegneristica, preferibilmente in Ingegneria Civile / Edile / Strutturale
* Hai almeno 2 anni di esperienza in un ruolo che unisce ingegneria applicata e interazione con il cliente
* Sai ragionare per soluzioni, non solo per calcoli
* Sei in grado di dialogare con interlocutori tecnici (progettisti, strutturisti, consulenti), traducendo esigenze complesse in proposte chiare
* Hai un approccio analitico, strutturato e orientato alla soluzione
* Ti muovi con autonomia, ma sai lavorare in squadra e confrontarti con figure diverse
* Ti trovi a tuo agio in un contesto dinamico, in crescita, dove i ruoli evolvono insieme all’azienda


**COSA OFFRIAMO**


* Lavoro **ibrido** con sede a **Gaggiano (MI)** e buona flessibilità organizzativa.
* **RAL 35\.000–40\.000 €**, in base all’esperienza.
* **Bonus collettivo** legato al raggiungimento degli obiettivi aziendali e di team.
* Piano **welfare** annuale e **ticket restaurant**.
* Ambiente **giovane, collaborativo e informale**, con spazi per crescere e proporre idee.

title: Sterile Operator
description:
**Work Schedule**


Other**Environmental Conditions**


Adherence to all Good Manufacturing Practices (GMP) Safety Standards, Cleanroom: no hair products, jewelry, makeup, nail polish, perfume, exposed piercings, facial hair etc... allowed**Job Description**


Join us at Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. to excel as a Sterile Operator. This outstanding opportunity allows you to be part of an exceptionally ambitious team, contributing to world\-class manufacturing operations in Monza. We are looking for individuals who can efficiently implement our high standards and thrive in a dynamic environment.

**Specific Tasks/Primary Activities:**

* Operate and clean production machines in the Injectable Department outside the Sterile Area according to the Batch Record and current SOPs.
* Complete the Batch Record and departmental documentation related to the tasks performed.
* Load filling lines outside the Sterile Area, ensuring material conformity as per the Batch Record.
* Operate production machines in the Sterile Area according to the Batch Record and SOPs.
* Perform filter integrity tests at the end of production activities as described in the Batch Record and SOPs.
* Clean machines in the Sterile Area at the end of production activities following the Batch Record and SOPs.
* Load/unload lyophilizers during production activities in compliance with SOPs.
* Clean lyophilizer chambers as per SOPs.
* Clean the Sterile Area at the end of production activities in accordance with SOPs.
* Conduct daily checks to ensure the constant availability of materials for operating the Sterile Area.
* Maintain machinery, materials, and the work environment, promptly reporting any anomalies to the supervisor.
* Handle chemical and microbiological sampling activities, preparing the related documentation as required by SOPs.

**Requirements and Qualifications:**


Crucial:

* Education/Training: Middle School Diploma or equivalent experience.
* Personality Traits: Responsibility, availability, and a proven track record in a similar role.


We value collaboration and dedication to flawless execution. If you are ready to take on new challenges and contribute to our mission, we want to hear from you!

title: Compounding Operator
description:
**Work Schedule**


Other**Environmental Conditions**


Adherence to all Good Manufacturing Practices (GMP) Safety Standards, Cleanroom: no hair products, jewelry, makeup, nail polish, perfume, exposed piercings, facial hair etc... allowed**Job Description**

**PURPOSE OF THE POSITION / RESPONSIBILITIES**
----------------------------------------------


In accordance with the instructions received from the Department Manager and/or Department Lead, the employee performs the tasks and activities listed below, for which they have been qualified through the appropriate training, in compliance with company and departmental SOPs as well as applicable safety regulations.

**SPECIFIC DUTIES / PRIMARY ACTIVITIES**
----------------------------------------


Prepare the filling lines within the Sterile Area at the start of production activities and subsequently monitor the correct product feeding process.


Perform integrity testing of 0\.22\-micron sterilizing filters, both hydrophilic and hydrophobic, including housing and disposable types, according to the frequencies specified in the current SOPs and the instructions reported in the Batch Records.


Carry out the dissolution and filtration of pharmaceutical products according to the instructions provided in the Batch Records.


Complete Batch Records and archive departmental documentation related to the activities performed.


Perform raw material identification using computerized information systems.


Conduct the cleaning and sterilization of reactors and tanks within the Injectable Products Department, following the instructions described in the current SOPs and in accordance with the weekly production schedule.


Ensure the proper storage and preparation of materials required for connecting the various reactors and tanks, following current SOPs and meeting the timelines established in the weekly production plan.


Prepare disinfectants for the routine cleaning of Sterile and Pre\-Sterile Areas, as described in the current SOPs.


In coordination with Supervisors, manage the transfer of materials required for production activities based on the products to be manufactured, using autoclaves and pass\-through systems.


Ensure the proper storage and preparation of materials required for connecting the various reactors and tanks, following current SOPs and adhering to the timelines established in the weekly production schedule.


Perform periodic checks to verify the correct operation of machinery and equipment in the preparation area, as required by current SOPs.


Carry out periodic testing and sterilization of hydrophobic filters installed on lyophilizers, following the instructions described in the current SOPs.


Take care of machinery, materials, and the work environment, promptly reporting any anomalies or issues to the supervisor.


Clean the work environment at the end of production activities in compliance with current SOPs.


Perform chemical and microbiological sampling activities and complete the related documentation in accordance with current SOPs.

**REQUIREMENTS AND QUALIFICATIONS**
-----------------------------------

### **Education / Diploma / Training:**

* **Scientific high school diploma, or middle school diploma with proven relevant work experience.**
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

title: Mechanical Maintenance Technician | Monza Focus Factory Sterile Area 7
description:
**Work Schedule**


7 1/2 hr shift**Environmental Conditions**


Able to lift 40 lbs. without assistance, Adherence to all Good Manufacturing Practices (GMP) Safety Standards, Cleanroom: no hair products, jewelry, makeup, nail polish, perfume, exposed piercings, facial hair etc... allowed, Some degree of PPE (Personal Protective Equipment) required (safety glasses, gowning, gloves, lab coat, ear plugs etc.), Will work with hazardous/toxic materials**Job Description**

**ITALIANO**
============

**Chi siamo**
-------------


Entrando a far parte di Thermo Fisher Scientific, contribuirai a svolgere un lavoro significativo con un impatto positivo su scala globale. Ogni giorno i nostri colleghi danno vita alla nostra Missione, consentendo ai clienti di rendere il mondo più sano, più pulito e più sicuro. Offriamo ai nostri team le risorse necessarie per raggiungere i propri obiettivi professionali e per affrontare alcune delle sfide più complesse del nostro tempo, dalla protezione dell'ambiente alla sicurezza alimentare, fino alla ricerca di cure innovative per i pazienti.

**Informazioni sulla sede/divisione**
-------------------------------------


Questa posizione è basata presso il sito produttivo Pharma Services Group di Monza e supporta le attività della nuova Area Sterile 7, dedicata alla produzione sterile di farmaci iniettabili. La risorsa entrerà a far parte di un team di manutenzione altamente specializzato, responsabile dell'affidabilità e delle prestazioni delle apparecchiature critiche utilizzate nei processi di riempimento asettico e produzione sterile.

**Come farai la differenza?**
-----------------------------


Contribuirai in modo diretto alla continuità operativa delle linee produttive sterili, garantendo che le apparecchiature funzionino in modo sicuro, affidabile e conforme ai requisiti normativi. Attraverso attività di manutenzione preventiva, correttiva e migliorativa, supporterai la produzione di farmaci di alta qualità destinati ai pazienti di tutto il mondo.

**Una giornata tipo**
---------------------

* Eseguire attività di manutenzione preventiva, correttiva e predittiva su macchine di riempimento, isolatori, sistemi di tappatura, trasportatori, autoclavi e impianti di lavaggio.
* Diagnosticare guasti meccanici, individuare le cause radice e implementare azioni correttive per ridurre i tempi di fermo impianto e migliorare l'affidabilità delle apparecchiature.
* Operare in ambienti sterili nel rispetto delle normative GMP, GDP ed EHS, collaborando con i team di Produzione, Ingegneria, Qualità e Validation.
* Supportare attività di installazione, commissioning e qualifica di nuove apparecchiature e partecipare a iniziative di miglioramento continuo.

**Formazione**
--------------

* Diploma di scuola secondaria superiore o titolo equivalente.  

*Preferenziale**:* Diploma tecnico o certificazione in Meccanica, Meccatronica, Manutenzione Industriale o discipline affini.

**Esperienza**
--------------

* Almeno 2 anni di esperienza in contesti produttivi, manutentivi o industriali.  

*Preferenziale*: esperienza in ambienti farmaceutici regolamentati secondo standard cGMP.  

*Preferenziale*: esperienza in clean room o ambienti asettici.  

*Preferenziale*: sperienza su sistemi meccanici o elettromeccanici complessi, inclusi impianti pneumatici e idraulici.

**Conoscenze, competenze e capacità**
-------------------------------------

* Solide capacità di troubleshooting meccanico e lettura di disegni tecnici, manuali e P\&ID.
* Conoscenza di pompe, attuatori, sistemi pneumatici e idraulici, apparecchiature rotanti e sistemi meccanici industriali.
* Capacità di lavorare in team e di gestire le priorità in un ambiente produttivo dinamico e altamente regolamentato.
* Forte orientamento alla sicurezza, alla qualità, alla conformità e al miglioramento continuo.
* Attenzione ai dettagli e approccio strutturato alla risoluzione dei problemi.

**Requisiti fisici e ambiente di lavoro**
-----------------------------------------

* Disponibilità a lavorare per periodi prolungati indossando abbigliamento sterile e dispositivi di protezione individuale (DPI).
* Capacità di svolgere attività manuali che includono il sollevamento di carichi fino a 18 kg, piegamenti, allungamenti e utilizzo di utensili e attrezzature.
* Disponibilità a lavorare su turni e, dopo una fase iniziale, a garantire supporto alle attività produttive a ciclo continuo (3x7 con shift 6/4\).
* Attività svolta prevalentemente in ambienti controllati e clean room.

**Cosa offriamo**
-----------------

**Retribuzione**
----------------

* Pacchetto retributivo competitivo
* Bonus legato alle performance
* Incremento retributivo annuale basato sulle prestazioni

**Benefit**
-----------

* Assicurazione sanitaria
* Ferie e permessi retribuiti
* Programma Employee Referral
* Opportunità di crescita e sviluppo professionale
* Accesso a programmi di formazione continua e sviluppo delle competenze

**ENGLISH**
===========

**About Us**
------------


As part of the Thermo Fisher Scientific team, you'll discover meaningful work that makes a positive impact on a global scale. Join our colleagues in bringing our Mission to life every day to enable our customers to make the world healthier, cleaner, and safer. We provide our global teams with the resources needed to achieve individual career goals while helping to take science a step beyond by developing solutions for some of the world's toughest challenges, from protecting the environment and ensuring food safety to developing life\-changing therapies for patients.

**Location/Division Specific Information**
------------------------------------------


This position is based at the Monza Pharma Services Group manufacturing site and supports operations within the newly built Sterile Area 7, dedicated to the sterile production of injectable drug products. The successful candidate will join a highly specialized maintenance team responsible for ensuring the reliability and performance of critical equipment used in aseptic filling and sterile manufacturing processes.

**How Will You Make an Impact?**
--------------------------------


You will contribute directly to the operational continuity of sterile manufacturing lines, ensuring that equipment operates safely, reliably, and in compliance with regulatory requirements. Through preventive, corrective, and improvement\-focused maintenance activities, you will support the production of high\-quality medicines for patients around the world.

**A Day in the Life**
---------------------

* Perform preventive, corrective, and predictive maintenance activities on filling machines, isolators, capping systems, conveyors, autoclaves, and washing equipment.
* Troubleshoot mechanical failures, identify root causes, and implement corrective actions to reduce downtime and improve equipment reliability.
* Work in sterile manufacturing environments in compliance with GMP, GDP, and EHS requirements while collaborating with Production, Engineering, Quality, and Validation teams.
* Support the installation, commissioning, and qualification of new equipment and participate in continuous improvement initiatives.

**Education**
-------------

* High School Diploma, Secondary Education, Advanced Certificate, or equivalent.  

*Preferred**:* Technical diploma or certification in Mechanical Engineering, Mechatronics, Industrial Maintenance, or a related field.

**Experience**
--------------

* Minimum of 2 years of experience in manufacturing, maintenance, industrial operations, or a related technical environment.  

*Preferred**:*Experience in pharmaceutical manufacturing environments operating under cGMP regulations.  

*Preferred**:* Experience working in cleanroom or aseptic manufacturing environments.  

*Preferred**:* Experience maintaining complex mechanical or electromechanical systems, including pneumatic and hydraulic equipment.

**Knowledge, Skills, Abilities**
--------------------------------

* Strong mechanical troubleshooting skills and the ability to interpret technical drawings, equipment manuals, and P\&IDs.
* Knowledge of pumps, actuators, pneumatic and hydraulic systems, rotating equipment, and industrial mechanical systems.
* Ability to work effectively in a team environment and manage priorities within a dynamic, highly regulated manufacturing setting.
* Strong commitment to safety, quality, compliance, and continuous improvement.
* Excellent attention to detail and a structured approach to problem\-solving.

**Physical Requirements / Work Environment**
--------------------------------------------

* Ability to work for extended periods while wearing sterile gowning and personal protective equipment (PPE).
* Ability to perform hands\-on mechanical work, including lifting loads up to 18 kg (40 lbs.), bending, reaching, and operating tools and equipment.
* Willingness to work shifts and, following an initial training period, support continuous manufacturing operations on a rotating shift schedule (3x7 pattern with a 6\-on/4\-off rotation).
* Work is primarily performed in controlled manufacturing environments and cleanroom areas.

**What We Offer**
-----------------

**Compensation**
----------------

* Competitive Pay
* Performance\-Related Bonus where eligible
* Annual merit performance\-based increase

**Benefits**
------------

* Medical benefits
* Paid Time Off / Annual Leave
* Employee Referral Program
* Career Advancement Opportunities
* Access to ongoing training and professional development programs

title: Senior QA Auditor - GCP Audits
description:
Milan, Italy \| Full time \| Home\-based \| R1549435


  
Plan and conduct independent clinical (GCP) audits to assess compliance with regulations, guidelines, and operating procedures. Prepare and distribute reports of findings to supervisor, operations staff, management, and customers. Provide consultation in interpretation of
  

regulations, guidelines, policies, and procedures. Support management in promotion and assessment of compliance to regulations, guidelines and corporate policies.


**Essential Functions**
  

* Plan, schedule, conduct, report and close audit activities in any of the countries involved with IQVIA contracts to assess compliance with applicable regulations/guidelines, customer requirements, IQVIA SOPs and project specific guidelines/instructions
* Evaluate audit findings and prepare and distribute reports to operations staff, management, and customers
* Provide interpretation and consultation to project teams on regulations, guidelines, compliance status, and policies and procedures
* Provide consultation to customers and monitors in interpretation of audit observations and formulation of corrective action plans
* Review, approve investigations, Root Cause Analysis (RCA), Corrective Action Prevention (CAPA) and Effectiveness Check (EC) plans and track till closure for quality events arising from Audits; and from Quality Issues, Inspections or during similar QA activities as assigned.
* Evaluate policies and procedures for compliance with applicable regulations/guidelines and provide recommendations to management for continuous process improvements
* Maintains the electronic quality management system (eQMS) and provides support in relation to the audit lifecycle
* Lead/collaborate/support in QA initiatives/projects for quality, process improvements
* Assist in training of new Quality Assurance staff
* May be required to manage Quality Issues
* May present educational programs and provide guidance to operational staff on compliance procedures
* May perform pre\-inspection visits at sites, host audits/inspections; ensure proper conduct of customer\-initiated audits and mock regulatory inspections, and assist in regulatory facility inspections, as assigned.

**Qualifications**
  

**• The right candidate must be Certified to conduct audits in Italy in accordance with the Italian Decree of the Ministry of Health dated 15 Nov 2011\.**


* Travel 30\-50% mainly in Europe.
* 5 years experience in pharmaceutical, technical, or related area, of which 3 years in Quality Assurance Audits.
* Experienced in the conduct of clinical trial Investigator site audits.
* Experience in the conduct of clinical study report/data management clinical trial audits is preferred.
* Knowledge of word\-processing, spreadsheet, and database applications.
* Extensive knowledge of pharmaceutical research and development processes and regulatory environments.
* Knowledge of quality assurance processes and procedures.
* Strong interpersonal skills.
* Excellent problem solving, risk analysis and negotiation skills.
* Strong training capabilities.
* Effective organization, communication, and team orientation skills.
* Ability to initiate assigned tasks and to work independently.
* Ability to manage multiple projects.
* Ability to establish and maintain effective working relationships with coworkers, managers and clients.


IQVIA is a leading global provider of clinical research services, commercial insights and healthcare intelligence to the life sciences and healthcare industries. We create intelligent connections to accelerate the development and commercialization of innovative medical treatments to help improve patient outcomes and population health worldwide. Learn more at https://jobs.iqvia.com


IQVIA is committed to integrity in our hiring process and maintains a zero tolerance policy for candidate fraud. All information and credentials submitted in your application must be truthful and complete. Any false statements, misrepresentations, or material omissions during the recruitment process will result in immediate disqualification of your application, or termination of employment if discovered later, in accordance with applicable law. We appreciate your honesty and professionalism.


The potential base pay range for this role, when annualized, is € 47\.500,00 \- € 71\.300,00\. The actual base pay offered may vary based on a number of factors including job\-related qualifications such as knowledge, skills, education, and experience; location; and/or schedule (full or part\-time). Dependent on the position offered, incentive plans, bonuses, and/or other forms of compensation may be offered, in addition to a range of health and welfare and/or other benefits.

title: Executive Director, General Partner (Biopharma Account Lead)
description:
**Work Schedule**


Standard (Mon\-Fri)**Environmental Conditions**


Office**Job Description**


At Thermo Fisher Scientific, you’ll discover meaningful work that makes a positive impact on a global scale. Join our colleagues in bringing our Mission to life \- enabling our customers to make the world healthier, cleaner and safer. We provide our teams with the resources needed to achieve individual career goals while taking science a step beyond through research, development and delivery of life\-changing therapies.


With clinical trials conducted in 100\+ countries and ongoing development of novel frameworks for clinical research through our PPD clinical research portfolio, our work spans laboratory, digital and decentralized clinical trial services. Your determination to deliver quality and accuracy will improve health outcomes that people and communities depend on – now and in the future.


We are looking to hire an **Executive Director, General Partner– Biopharma.**


As the Executive Director General Partner, you will be accountable for the strategic direction across assigned developing partnership account(s) working closely with a commercial Group Leader to focus on accelerating the growth and expanding the relationship of biopharmaceutical customers into strategic partnership accounts. This role will provide consultation, direction, and leadership to functional leads and employees to ensure commercial excellence, consistency, quality, innovation and learning across the portfolio of work inclusive of operational and financial targets. Provides an important interface with the client and with other departments internally on all aspects of assigned partnership account(s).

**How will you make an impact:**  

  

You will enable our customers to make the world healthier, cleaner and safer by helping our clients and sponsors to understand how our clinical development service offering enables them to deliver life\-changing therapies to their patients more quickly.


What will you do:

 **Relationship Management**: Cultivate and expand deep relationships at the highest levels within the account working in close coordination with your direct reports and other departments. Establish and grow customer loyalty and Customer Delight, including proactively engaging customers with insights on industry trends and potential challenges to position proactive innovative solutions to overcome them. Drive engagement between Executive Sponsor and other senior executives within broader Thermo Fisher leadership to foster deep trust and confidence in CRG’s offerings while gaining business insights to accelerate expansion. Make connections and identify new account areas for potential footprint expansion. Build and strengthen client advocacy and engagement at the highest account organizational levels. Establish robust CRG stakeholder management across all business units.  

  

**Account Ownership:** Drive team to achieve target within Clinical Development Services Division and all Clinical Research business units. Expand existing commercial presence to grow account into strategic partner. Central point of contact for internal and external communication across all CRG. Proactively engages and drive internal stakeholders across the TMO organization (CRG, PSG, other groups), direct reports, and business partners (Finance, Legal, Sales, Operational Delivery, Governance) to ensure operational, financial and commercial goals are achieved. Coaches team and is actively involved on proposals and bid defenses and owns partnership pursuits efforts within account. Develop and maintain active account plan and demonstrate progress against planned strategies. Proactively solicits feedback from internal and external stakeholders to capture business intelligence for all account team members to share intelligence, best practices, and drive competitive differentiation.  

  

**Develops Growth Strategies:** Identifies key areas of strategic expansion within account and drives proactive selling across all business units within CRG and across PSG. Collaborates with therapeutic unit leadership to develop strategies and execute against account growth plan with emphasis on enterprise level view. Develops innovative commercial solutions (including commercial constructs, financial incentive structures, operational models) and proactively presents to customer to address existing challenges. Proactively identify and address financial, operational, relationship and quality concerns aligned with customer needs while emphasizing TMO’s market differentiation. Develops strong working relationships with internal operational, commercial and finance partners to execute according to plan. Prioritize top revenue generation and maximize to increase market penetration.  

  

**Operational quality and efficiency:** Enterprise champion collaborating effectively with direct reports and operational colleagues to ensure exquisite operational delivery, exceed operational milestones while maintaining expected levels of quality and rigor. Coach Dev Ops and others to proactively address potential challenges and issues while optimizing existing operating models to support more efficient ways of working. Drive incumbency on account,  

  

**Innovation:** Leverage collective relationship to identify customer needs to inform innovation and investment strategies. Demonstrates a deep understanding of the client’s market position, needs, and competitive landscape consistently with ability to influence internal commercial, technological and operational innovation to proactively reduce gaps and drive transformation. Deeply understand industry trends to inform clients. Challenge enterprise on client needs to force innovation discussion and application to proactively reduce gaps and drive process improvements.  

  

**Team Management:** Recruit, train, and manage the high\-performing account team, including business development and development operations. Foster a collaborative and motivated environment focused on accountability for results, client advocacy and innovative problem solving by providing rigorous oversight, coaching and guidance to maximize individual and team performance using Challenger methodology. Ensure consistent delivery for each business development representative of top\-line sales goals and targeted profit contribution. Drives commercial execution excellence. Correctly use Salesforce and enforce all sales administrative tasks.

**How will you get here:**

* A bachelor’s degree in business administration, sales, or a related field is the required minimum education; MBA or advanced degree is preferred.
* Previous experience that provides the knowledge, skills, and abilities to perform the job comparable to 15\+ years; strong preference for experience in a CRO, Pharmaceutical or Medical Device sales industry.
* Proven sales history with breadth of domestic geographic responsibility and 5\+ years of account management experience. In some cases, an equivalency, consisting of a combination of appropriate education, training and/or directly related experience, will be considered sufficient for an individual to meet the requirements of the role.

**Knowledge, Skills and Abilities:**

* Demonstrated success in a similar commercial leadership role that has consistently achieved and exceeded commercial targets.
* Robust **Clinical Operations** experience
* **In\-depth knowledge of the CRO industry and clinical trial processes**, including regulatory requirements and best practices. Strong understanding of complex technical requirements and the ability to effectively communicate technical information to both technical and non\-technical stakeholders.
* Excellent leadership and communication skills, with the ability to effectively collaborate, cultivate and influence stakeholders across functions and at all levels. Executive presence with ability to build and foster senior level customer relationships.
* Demonstrates robust judgment, problem solving and decision making; Ability to apply critical and analytical thinking and business acumen to develop effective solutions.
* A “big\-picture” thinker with the ability to contribute meaningfully to strategic discussions while also remaining attuned to the details required for successful operational execution.
* Ability to create constructive tension with customers by identifying customer challenges and potential gaps, designing customized solutions and messaging to influence customer behavior and influence the buying process
* Understanding of management, planning, organizing and resourcing skills and managing priorities. A high tolerance for ambiguity and the ability to navigate complexity
* Great communicator and negotiator, able to develop shared perspectives and achieve actionable results through others.
* Ability to handle complex situations and multiple responsibilities simultaneously mixing long term projects with the urgency of immediate demands on the operations.
* Demonstrated analytical skills with the ability to judge situations accurately and quickly, grasping complexities, identifying key issues and applying sound judgment.
* Ability to quickly and effectively build credibility and strong relationships at all levels
* Strategic thinker with ability to uncover and understand customer needs and construct novel enterprise level solutions to address customer needs
* Must show the ability to demonstrate the Thermo Fisher values (The Four I’s) – Integrity, Intensity, Innovation, and Involvement

**Working Conditions and Environment:**

* Work is performed in an office environment with exposure to electrical office equipment.
* Travel, both domestic and international.
* Interaction with clients/associates required.
* Long varied hours required occasionally.

**What we offer:**


At PPD Clinical Research Services we hire the best, develop ourselves and each other, and recognise the power of being one team. We understand that you will want to grow both professionally and personally throughout your career, and therefore at PPD you will benefit from an award\-winning learning and development programme, ensuring you reach your potential.


As well as being rewarded a competitive salary, we have an extensive benefits package based around the health and well\-being of our employees. We have a flexible working culture, where PPD Clinical Research Services truly value a work\-life balance. We’ve grown sustainably year on year but continue to offer a collaborative environment, with teams of colleagues eager to share expertise and have fun together. We are a global organisation but with a local feel.


Our Mission is to enable our customers to make the world healthier, cleaner and safer. Watch as our colleagues explain 5 reasons to work with us. As one team of 100,000\+ colleagues, we share a common set of values \- Integrity, Intensity, Innovation and Involvement \- working together to accelerate research, solve complex scientific challenges, drive technological innovation and support patients in need. \#StartYourStory with PPD, part of Thermo Fisher Scientific, where diverse experiences, backgrounds and perspectives are valued.


Apply today! http://jobs.thermofisher.com

title: Sr Dir Ops - Medical Communications
description:
**Work Schedule**


Standard (Mon\-Fri)**Environmental Conditions**


Office**Job Description**


Join us as a Director Operations – And lead our medical information operations team to develop and implement strategic initiatives, ensure compliance with regulatory standards, manage the dissemination of accurate medical information, and collaborate with healthcare professionals to advance our organizational goals.  

  

At Thermo Fisher Scientific, you’ll discover meaningful work that makes a positive impact on a global scale. Join our colleagues in bringing our Mission to life \- enabling our customers to make the world healthier, cleaner and safer. We provide our teams with the resources needed to achieve individual career goals while taking science a step beyond through research, development and delivery of life\-changing therapies. With clinical trials conducted in 100\+ countries and ongoing development of novel frameworks for clinical research through our PPD clinical research portfolio, our work spans laboratory, digital and decentralized clinical trial services. Your determination to deliver quality and accuracy will improve health outcomes that people and communities depend on – now and in the future.  

  

What You’ll Do:  

* Lead the division and cultivate a supportive, motivating and collaborative work environment and builds an effective and productive team focused on overall corporate objectives.
* Ensure projects are properly resourced, managed, and executed and develop verifiable project goals for Associate Directors.
* Oversee and/or coordinate new project implementation. Work closely with client contact(s) during project implementation and develops working rapport.
* Maintain a working client relationship with open lines of communication for the life of the project.
* Work closely with Business Development in the areas of proposals/contracts, client presentations, and maintains client relationships.
* Oversee salary administration, performance management, conflict resolution, recruiting and mentoring for Associate Directors and other direct reports.
* Ensure quality objectives are met and oversees audit preparedness, appropriate response to internal and external audits, addressing and correcting audit


findings; responding to client feedback; and development of and compliance with SOP's.  

* Manage overall budget activity for divisional areas(s) to ensure profitability: review billable hour reports for divisional area(s), tracks projects' success in


achieving financial targets; determine the resource needs and ensures correct revenue forecast.  

* Drive a culture of immediate action and proactive escalation

  

Education and Experience:  

* Previous experience in health care or pharmaceutical industry that provides the knowledge, skills, and abilities to perform the job (comparable to 12\+ years).
* Strong leadership skills include 5\+ years of management responsibility.
* Education may be substituted in lieu of some years of experience for advanced degrees such as Pharm.D, Ph.D. MS and MD.

  

In some cases an equivalency, consisting of a combination of appropriate education, training and/or directly related experience, will be considered sufficient for an individual to meet the requirements of the role.  

  

Required Knowledge, Skills, Abilities:  

* Directs through lower management levels. Has responsibility for managing a function that includes multiple related departments. In some instances, they may be responsible for a functional area (as determined by executive management) and not have subordinate supervisors or employees. May manage employees across multiple regions.
* Work is performed in an office environment with exposure to electrical office equipment
* Constant interaction with clients/associates required
* Must pay constant attention to detail\-visual, mental
* Must be able to multi\-task constantly
* Long, varied hours required occasionally
* Daily exposure to high pressure, intense concentration
* Occasional drives to site locations, frequent travels both domestic and international

  

Physical Requirements / Work Environment:  

* Frequently stationary for 6\-8 hours per day
* Repetitive hand movement of both hands with the ability to make fast, simple, repeated movements of the fingers, hands, and wrists
* Moderate mobility required
* Occasional crouching, stooping, bending and twisting of upper body and neck
* Light to moderate lifting and carrying (or otherwise moves) objects including luggage and laptop computer with a maximum lift of 15\-20 lbs.
* Ability to access and use a variety of computer software developed both in\-house and off\-the\-shelf
* Ability to communicate complex information and ideas so others will understand, with the ability to listen to and understand information and ideas presented through spoken words and sentences
* Frequently interacts with others, relates sensitive information to diverse groups both internally \& externally
* Ability to apply abstract principles to solve complex conceptual issues. Requires multiple periods of intense concentration
* Performs a wide range of complex tasks as dictated by variable demands and changing conditions with little predictability as to the occurrence. Ability to perform under stress. Ability to multi\-task
* Regular and consistent attendance

  

Why Join Us?  

When you join Thermo Fisher Scientific, you become part of a global team that values passion, innovation, and a commitment to scientific excellence. You’ll work in an environment where collaboration and development are part of the everyday experience – and where your contributions truly make a difference.  

  

Apply today to help us deliver tomorrow’s breakthrough.

title: IT O&L Senior System Engineer
description:
**THE POSITION**
----------------

We are looking for an experienced, team\-oriented, and dynamic Senior System Engineer to strengthen the Global IT Operations and Laboratory Manufacturing Team.


In the role of Senior IT System Engineer the candidate will play a crucial role in supporting our production processes with global standard functions in combination with innovative solutions.


The candidate will also act as a business partner connected with internal and external IT colleagues, acting as an expert for existing and new global systems, for local Italian systems.


This role is pivotal in supporting the digital transformation journey of both Italian production sites in Fornovo San Giovanni (BG) and Noventa Padovana (PD), with a strong focus on the investment programs, which aims to elevate the site’s digitalization and integration with global solutions. The candidate will foster a culture of innovation, proactively engage with business partners, and ensure the sustainability and competitiveness of these very important locations in the Boehringer Ingelheim network.  



**Responsibilities:**
---------------------

* Act as IT partner for local Italian production sites, engaging with Local and Global stakeholders, and external vendors to align business needs with IT solutions and anticipate site requirements, risks, and improvement opportunities.
* Own the end‑to‑end lifecycle of global and local IT solutions, including design, development, testing, deployment, operation, maintenance, and continuous improvement.
* Coordinate and steer system‑related activities proactively, ensuring timely execution and adherence to agreed standards.
* Maintain system architectures and documentation throughout the solution lifecycle.
* Lead medium to large IT initiatives or contribute as a key expert in complex projects.
* Drive the simplification, automation, and standardization of IT services and processes in close collaboration with other IT specialists.
* Manage incidents and escalations, orchestrating effective solution resolution and demonstrating strong problem‑solving capabilities.
* Ensure solutions meet quality, compliance, and regulatory requirements, including GxP, legal, and corporate standards.
* Support and help manage the site and area IT budget and resources, ensuring efficient utilization and strong performance.
* Contribute to the successful execution of digital transformation initiatives and ensure seamless integration with global platforms.
Promote collaboration, diversity, and continuous development within the IT organization to strengthen overall capability and flexibility.  
* 

**Requirements:**

* Bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, business informatics, engineering or a comparable qualification.
* Not less than 3 years of professional experience in the IT environment.
* Comprehensive knowledge of design, built, validation, rollout and operating computerized systems within the GxP environment.
* Project management experience in medium/large IT projects.
* Excellent communication in Italian and English.
* Proactive communicator.
* Cost\-conscious, with a focus on business value and sustainability.
* Passion for innovation, with a track record of identifying and implementing new technologies or processes.
* Ability to work effectively in virtual and multicultural environments.
Experience with the pharmaceutical manufacturing processes in development and/or commercial operations will be a plus.  
* 

**What we offer:**
------------------

* For this position we offer a permanent contract.
* The gross annual base salary foreseen for this position ranges from €49,600 to €66,000, depending on candidate's skills and experience.
* Free access to the company canteen and ticket restaurants when working remotely.
* A wide range of benefits for your physical, financial, social and mental wellbeing.

A support to develop your own professional and personal paths, including our full range of development programs.  

* 

We warmly welcome applications from candidates belonging to protected categories, in accordance with Law 68/99\.


We foster a workplace built on respect, trust, and empathy—free from discrimination. We are powered by our people, and we believe that our differences are our strengths. Everyone is valued, respected and empowered to be themselves.

title: Senior Expert Strategic Sourcing (m/f/d) Italy MEP
description:
Location: Agrate Brianza, Italy
Category: Procurement
Job ID: 23493
Permanent
Exyte Italy S.r.l. (1006\)
  
**Discover your exciting role**
-------------------------------


As a Senior Expert Strategic Sourcing (MEP), you play a key role in strengthening Exyte’s regional supply chain capabilities across Italy. You will develop and implement sourcing strategies for Mechanical, Electrical and Process (MEP) equipment, work packages, and installation scopes—ensuring competitive commercial outcomes and reliable project execution.
  

Acting at the interface of engineering, construction, procurement, and project management, you contribute to building a resilient supplier base and advancing Exyte’s delivery excellence.


**Explore your tasks and responsibilities**
-------------------------------------------


* Develop and execute regional MEP sourcing strategies (e.g. HVAC, piping, electrical, instrumentation, installation services) aligned with global category management
* Establish and negotiate Master Framework Agreements (MFAs) with key suppliers and subcontractors
* Build and manage a high\-performing regional supplier base, including OEMs and installation partners
* Drive sourcing initiatives to improve Total Cost of Ownership (TCO), lead times, and project execution reliability
* Lead Supplier Relationship Management (SRM), including performance reviews and risk escalation
* Support project teams with preferred supplier lists, cost inputs, and sourcing strategies during proposals and execution
* Identify opportunities to optimize sourcing models (e.g. direct procurement vs. subcontracting)
* Ensure compliance with procurement policies, safety (EHS), quality and regulatory requirements
* Provide regional market intelligence (pricing, capacity, lead times) and contribute to global category strategies
* Collaborate cross\-functionally with Engineering, Construction, Procurement, and Project Management teams
**Show your expertise**
-----------------------


* 7–10\+ years of experience in strategic sourcing / procurement within MEP, EPC, life sciences, semiconductor, data centers, or similar industries
* Strong track record in developing sourcing strategies, negotiating commercial agreements, and delivering measurable value
* Solid understanding of MEP equipment, installation methods, and construction project environments
* Experience managing suppliers and subcontractors, including performance and risk management
* Strong analytical skills (cost modelling, benchmarking, supplier evaluation)
* Ability to collaborate across functions and influence stakeholders
* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Supply Chain, Construction Management, or Business; certifications are a plus
* Fluent in English and Italian (min. C1 Level)

*The salary range for this position is between € 71'400 and € 85'000 gross per year (full\-time). The exact salary will be determined within this range based on objective and transparent criteria, including role scope, qualifications, and relevant professional experience.*


**Contact:**
------------


You want to be part of the Exyte team? We look forward to receiving your application!
  

For further questions and information, please do not hesitate to contact Ilayda Öztürk via E\-Mail at ilayda.oeztuerk@exyte.net.

  

Please note that we only consider applications submitted through our application portal. Applications sent via email will not be considered due to data protection regulations.

title: Architectural Assistant (H/F)
description:
**The Studio**



Founded in 2006 in Paris, Reid Brewin Architects (RBA) has developed into a dynamic international practice, now home to more than 150 team members across our studios in London, Paris, Milan, Madrid, and Frankfurt. We specialise in high\-specification, large\-scale projects – particularly in data centres, commercial offices, and luxury retail. Known for our technical excellence and design\-led approach, we offer a vibrant, multicultural environment.



To support the continued growth of our Milan studio, RBA is seeking an **Assistant Architect** to join our team and work on complex development projects in Italy and across Europe, with a specific focus on data centres and related infrastructure.

  


**Key Responsibilities**


* Support the Project Architect across all project phases, from concept design to detailed construction documentation, contributing to design development that ensures architectural quality and continuous dialogue with clients and local authorities.
* Collaborate on the technical development of the project, ensuring full compliance with Italian building codes, zoning regulations, and planning urban laws.
* Assist the Project Architect in preparing comprehensive documentation (architectural drawings, reports, bills of quantities, technical specifications) for project milestones, public authority submissions, and potential tender participations.
* Actively and effectively support coordination with clients, consultants, suppliers, municipal technical offices, and regulatory bodies, ensuring clear and continuous communication.
* Support the identification and resolution of any design and technical issues arising throughout the project’s development.
* Ensure architectural quality, technical accuracy, and strict adherence to project timelines, budget constraints, and client requirements.

  


**Candidate Profile**



The **Architect** will contribute to the development and management of complex projects, working specifically on data centers and other technical infrastructure across Europe. Working within multicultural teams, the successful candidate will develop design solutions, produce technical drawings and documentation, and ensure rigorous regulatory compliance. The ideal candidate possesses solid design skills, works independently, and collaborates effectively within a team while maintaining high standards of quality, precision, timelines, and project objectives.

  


**Requirements**


* Master’s degree in Architecture, Building Engineering, or an equivalent qualification
* Minimum of 3 years of post\-graduate professional experience
* Strong design, communication, and presentation skills
* Proficiency in Revit and BIM methodology
* In\-depth knowledge of Italian building regulations and permitting procedure
* Strong motivation, personal commitment, and outstanding interpersonal skills with a proven track record of managing client relations
* Full professional proficiency in both Italian and English

  


**Desirable**


* Experience working on large\-scale projects
* Experience with data centers or high\-tech/commercial projects
* Knowledge of French and/or Spanish
* Proficiency in AutoCAD

  


**What We Offer**



Joining our studio means entering a dynamic, international, and multicultural environment geared toward growth. We truly believe in the value of our people and are committed to providing working and human conditions that foster well\-being, professional development, and collaboration.



Key benefits include:


* An inclusive, collaborative, and growing work environment, with teams distributed across Paris, London, Madrid, Milan, and Frankfurt.
* Opportunities to work on complex and challenging projects, with great potential for professional development and continuous training.
* Contract type to be defined based on experience and professional background.
* Smart working opportunities (hybrid work model).


If you are looking for a new professional challenge and believe you are the ideal candidate, please send your CV, portfolio, and a short cover letter/email to studio@rb\-architects.com, entering the application code IT\-WS\-AA2026 in the subject line.


**We are also recruiting across our studios in Paris, Milan, Madrid, and Frankfurt.**

  


**Equal Opportunities \& Data Protection**



Reid Brewin Architects is committed to equal opportunities and welcomes applications from all qualified candidates. Personal data submitted during the recruitment process will be processed only for recruitment purposes and in accordance with applicable data protection laws, including the GDPR where applicable.


*Please include the following statement in your CV: « I authorize the processing of my personal data in accordance with EU Regulation 2016/679\. »*

title: Data Protection Stageur
description:

* Trainee
